title: Crypto Brief — 25 Jun 2026
intro: Markets show modest 24h recovery with green across the board, but weekly losses persist indicating underlying weakness. ETH outperformance versus BTC and privacy coin pressure suggest sector rotation amid consolidation.

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO SUMMARY
sections.content: Markets show modest 24h recovery with green across the board, but weekly losses persist indicating underlying weakness. ETH outperformance versus BTC and privacy coin pressure suggest sector rotation amid consolidation.

sections.heading: 📊 ASSET RANKING
sections.content:
Avalanche $6.51 +10.23% 7d — Only major gainer on weekly timeframe, strong momentum break
Ethereum $1651 +1.92% 24h — Leading 24h gains, outpacing BTC by 79 basis points
Solana $69.01 +1.51% 24h — Best weekly performance among top caps excluding AVAX
Bitcoin $61683 +1.13% 24h — Holding structure despite 2.92% weekly decline
Ripple $1.08 +0.93% 24h — Weak 7d at -4.77%, lagging recovery
Zcash $416 +0.03% 24h — Worst performer, -12.74% weekly, privacy sector under pressure
🔵 BITCOIN
BTC trades at $61683 with bullish sentiment intact despite 2.92% weekly drawdown. Key support cluster at $60000-$60500 must hold to maintain structure, resistance at $63800. Institutional accumulation patterns remain constructive despite chop.
🔷 ETHEREUM
ETH at $1651 showing relative strength with +0.79% outperformance versus BTC in 24h window. DeFi TVL stabilization and Layer 2 activity uptick supporting price action despite 3.51% weekly loss.
🚀 TOP ALT
Avalanche $6.51 — Only top-10 asset positive on 7d with +10.23% surge, breaking multi-week downtrend on subnet deployment news.

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: Avalanche — Momentum continuation play — Entry $6.40-$6.60 — SL $5.95 — TP $7.80
LONG: Ethereum — BTC ratio strength — Entry $1640-$1660 — SL $1585 — TP $1785
SHORT/AVOID: Zcash — Privacy coin regulatory overhang, failed bounce, broken support at $420.

sections.heading: ⚠️ RISKS
sections.content:
Weekly downtrends remain unbroken for most assets; current 24h bounce may be relief rally within larger correction structure.
Cardano and Polkadot showing -7.83% and -7.66% weekly losses signal potential altcoin contagion if support levels fail.
